sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: JPMorgan ultra-short income ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.1720
feed.summary: The JPMorgan Ultra-Short Income ETF (JPST) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.1720 per share for its unitholders. This announcement pertains to its short-term income strategy.

feed.title: Precision Trading with Jpmorgan Short Duration Core Plus Etf (JSCP) Risk Zones
feed.summary: This article analyzes Jpmorgan Short Duration Core Plus Etf (JSCP), indicating a neutral sentiment across all time horizons and suggesting a wait-and-see approach for investors. It outlines three AI-generated trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—with specific entry, target, and stop-loss zones for different risk profiles. The analysis highlights an elevated downside risk with no clear long-term support signals remaining.

feed.title: JADE Stock Price | JPMorgan Active Developing Markets Equity ETF
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information on the JPMorgan Active Developing Markets Equity ETF (JADE), including its current stock price, trading exchange (NYSE), and key statistics like dividend yield, expense ratio, and market capitalization. It also lists the ETF's top holdings, company profile, and a technical analysis overview, classifying it as a "Strong Sell" based on current indicators.

feed.title: INTEGRA GRANTS ANNUAL INCENTIVE AWARDS
feed.summary: Integra Resources Corp. announced that on March 27, 2026, it granted a total of 1,323,308 options, 862,669 restricted share units, and 142,275 deferred share units to employees, executives, directors, and consultants. These Equity Incentive Awards were granted under the Company's Amended and Restated Equity Incentive Plan and are subject to vesting provisions. The options have an exercise price of C$3.53 per share and will expire in five years.

feed.title: Investar Holding updates financials after Wichita Falls Bancshares merger By Investing.com
feed.summary: Investar Holding Corporation has updated its financial statements and related information following its merger with Wichita Falls Bancshares, Inc. The update includes new audited and pro forma financial data, reflecting the combined company's financial position. This follows the completion of the acquisition valued at approximately $112.9 million and the company's declaration of its 50th consecutive quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Immix Biopharma (IMMX) price target increased by 25.64% to 16.66
feed.summary: A financial analyst has increased the price target for Immix Biopharma (IMMX) by 25.64%. The new target is set at $16.66. This adjustment indicates a more optimistic outlook on the company's stock valuation from the analyst.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. $WSM Shares Sold by Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly reduced its stake in Williams-Sonoma (WSM) by 56.2% in Q4, selling 29,489 shares. Meanwhile, other major institutions like Boston Partners and Norges Bank initiated or increased their holdings, with institutional ownership reaching approximately 99.29%. Williams-Sonoma beat Q4 EPS estimates and raised its quarterly dividend, despite a year-over-year revenue decline, though insiders, including the CEO and CFO, sold a substantial number of shares.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc. $KVUE Shares Sold by Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly reduced its stake in Kenvue Inc. (KVUE) by 41.3% in Q4, selling 197,170 shares. Despite Kenvue beating earnings and revenue estimates for the quarter and offering a 4.8% dividend yield, analyst consensus remains a "Hold" with an average target price of $19.58, and Jefferies downgraded the stock from "Buy" to "Hold." The company's high payout ratio of 107.79% and institutional ownership of 97.64% are also noteworthy.

feed.title: Natural Cycles integration unlocks FDA-cleared birth control app for users with select Garmin smartwatches
feed.summary: Garmin has announced an integration with Natural Cycles, enabling users of select Garmin smartwatches to use their skin temperature data for fertility insights within the FDA-cleared Natural Cycles app. This collaboration provides a non-hormonal approach to birth control and family planning, expanding Natural Cycles' wearable ecosystem. The integration is currently available in several countries, including the US, UK, Canada, and the EU.

feed.title: TrueMark Investments LLC Reduces Stock Position in The Clorox Company $CLX
feed.summary: TrueMark Investments LLC significantly cut its stake in The Clorox Company by 91.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 49,749 shares and retaining 4,430 shares valued at approximately $447,000. Despite this, other institutions like MIRAE ASSET GLOBAL ETFS HOLDINGS Ltd. and Woodline Partners LP increased their positions. Clorox recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.24, yielding 4.8%, and reported Q4 EPS of $1.39, missing estimates, with analysts maintaining a "Reduce" rating and a target price of $118.

feed.title: BlackRock partners with GMPF to invest £1B in NHS property: FT
feed.summary: The article reports that BlackRock has partnered with the Greater Manchester Pension Fund (GMPF) to invest £1 billion in NHS property. This collaboration aims to provide capital for healthcare infrastructure projects. The investment highlights a growing trend of institutional investors funding public sector assets.

feed.title: TrueMark Investments LLC Sells 108,926 Shares of General Mills, Inc. $GIS
feed.summary: TrueMark Investments LLC significantly reduced its stake in General Mills (NYSE:GIS) by 89.9% in Q4, selling 108,926 shares and retaining 12,279 shares valued at $571,000. This sale comes amidst General Mills missing Q4 earnings estimates, multiple analyst price target cuts resulting in a "Reduce" consensus rating from MarketBeat, and a reported 36% share price decline over the past year. Despite these challenges, the company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.61 (6.6% yield) with an ex-dividend date of April 10th.

feed.title: Conagra keeps dividend streak alive with $0.35 payout since 1976
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (NYSE: CAG) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 per share, payable on June 3, 2026, to shareholders recorded by April 30, 2026. The company has a long history of paying consecutive quarterly dividends since January 1976, demonstrating a consistent commitment to returning value to shareholders. Conagra Brands is a leading North American branded food company with a diverse portfolio of well-known brands.

feed.title: Conagra Brands Announces Quarterly Dividend Payment
feed.summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend payment of $0.35 per share of common stock. The dividend will be paid on June 3, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 30, 2026. The company has a history of paying consecutive quarterly dividends since January 1976.

feed.title: Hershey Unveils Strategy to Lead Next Generation Snacking at 2026 Investor Day – Company Announcement
feed.summary: The Hershey Company is holding its 2026 Investor Day to detail its strategy for "Leading Next Generation Snacking." This involves building on core brands, expanding into premium and functional snacking, adopting an integrated commercial model, and implementing a modern, AI-powered supply chain. Hershey also reaffirmed its full-year 2026 financial outlook, projecting continued growth in net sales and earnings per share.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Up in Premarket Trading; Parsons, FactSet Research Systems Lead
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures are showing gains in premarket trading. Parsons Corp. (PSN) saw a 7.3% increase, while FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) was up 5.6% ahead of the market open.

feed.title: Biotech MiNK targets up to 300,000 ARDS patients as Phase 2 starts
feed.summary: MiNK Therapeutics reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, highlighting a cash balance of $13.4 million and advancing its Phase 2 ARDS and GVHD programs. The company plans to initiate its Phase 2 ARDS trial in the first half of 2026, targeting 200,000-300,000 patients annually in the US and EU, with clinical readouts expected in the second half of 2026. MiNK is also benefiting from non-dilutive funding, including a $1.1 million collaboration with C-Further and grants for its GVHD program.

feed.title: Bank of America (BAC) Receives a Buy from Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Mike Mayo maintained a Buy rating on Bank of America (BAC) with a $65.00 price target, highlighting his strong track record. This positive outlook follows Bank of America's solid Q4 earnings, which showed increased revenue and net profit year-over-year. However, the article also notes negative insider sentiment due to an increase in share selling, including a significant sale by International President Bernard A Mensah.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Increases Stock Position in APA Corporation $APA
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its stake in APA Corporation by 71.0% in Q4 2025, now holding 185,818 shares valued at approximately $4.44 million. This increase occurred despite an APA director selling a large portion of his shares and the company’s Q4 revenue falling 26.6% year-over-year. APA Corporation also beat quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25.

feed.title: Guggenheim reiterates Neutral on Costco stock amid gas prices
feed.summary: Guggenheim has maintained its Neutral rating on Costco (NASDAQ:COST), noting that rising gasoline prices are expected to benefit the retailer's profit and loss statement. Despite expected strong sales growth and outperformance relative to the S&P 500, the firm views Costco's valuation and recent stock performance as elevated, making the shares vulnerable to market shifts. Other recent news includes strong membership performance, new store openings in Canada, and the introduction of Kirkland-branded competitive products.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Has $4.05 Million Stock Position in Deckers Outdoor Corporation $DECK
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its stake in Deckers Outdoor Corporation by 253.8% in Q4, acquiring 37,702 shares valued at $4.05 million. Deckers Outdoor reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $3.33 EPS and $1.96 billion in revenue. Despite some insider selling, institutional investors maintain a substantial 97.79% ownership, and analysts rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target of $125.20.

feed.title: Wealth Management Partners LLC Has $31.48 Million Holdings in NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA
feed.summary: Wealth Management Partners LLC reduced its stake in NVIDIA Corporation by 3.4% in the fourth quarter, now holding 168,788 shares valued at $31.48 million, making NVIDIA its largest holding. Despite this institutional trimming and significant insider selling, NVIDIA's fundamentals remain strong with solid quarterly earnings, a declared dividend, and a positive consensus analyst target. However, the company faces some negative sentiment regarding valuation pressures and institutional selling, and operational concerns like helium shortages.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Eyes Oil Windfall To Boost Buybacks And Dividend Growth
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips is poised to use a potential windfall from higher oil prices, fueled by conflict with Iran, to increase share buybacks and dividend growth. Management intends to direct extra free cash flow towards returning capital to shareholders, aiming for dividend payouts among the top S&P 500 companies. Investors should monitor the sustainability of these payouts, insider selling, and how the balance between reinvestment and shareholder returns is managed given ongoing large-scale projects and market risks.

feed.title: Immunic appoints Jon Congleton to board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: Immunic, Inc. has appointed Jon Congleton to its board of directors, effective March 27, leveraging his nearly 40 years of biopharmaceutical experience, particularly in central nervous system and multiple sclerosis treatments. Congleton, who helped launch Copaxone, currently serves as CEO of Mineralys Therapeutics and previously held CEO roles at Impel NeuroPharma and Nivalis Therapeutics. The biotechnology company is developing oral therapies for neurologic diseases, with its lead program in Phase 3 clinical trials, and has recently secured a $200 million private placement financing.

feed.title: Everest Group, Ltd. $EG Shares Sold by Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC reduced its stake in Everest Group by 41.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 8,695 shares and retaining 12,381 shares valued at $4.08 million. Despite missing EPS estimates slightly at $13.26, Everest Group reported revenues of $4.42 billion, exceeding expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend of $2.00. The stock holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $363.21.

feed.title: Delta inks a sweeping deal with Amazon for in-flight connectivity (DAL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines and Amazon have signed a long-term agreement to enhance in-flight connectivity and digital experiences for Delta passengers. The airline plans to install Amazon Leo on hundreds of its aircraft as part of this partnership. This deal aims to bring next-generation technology to Delta's cabins.

feed.title: Iterum Therapeutics to be delisted from Nasdaq as winding up process advances
feed.summary: Iterum Therapeutics plc announced that its ordinary shares will be delisted from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC and trading will be suspended on Wednesday, April 1st. This decision follows the company's failure to maintain a minimum bid price and its subsequent withdrawal of an appeal against Nasdaq's delisting determination. Iterum Therapeutics has also filed a petition in Ireland to wind up the company and does not expect to file further reports with the SEC due to limited cash resources.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (FDS) FactSet Research Systems Inc. Posts Q2 Adjusted EPS $4.46 per Share
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) announced adjusted EPS of $4.46 per share for its second fiscal quarter. The company also reported Q2 revenue of $611.0 million, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $604.8 million. FactSet Research Systems has lifted its fiscal 2026 guidance, expecting revenue between $2.45 billion and $2.47 billion and adjusted EPS ranging from $17.25 to $17.75.

feed.title: Devil Wears Prada
feed.summary: This article announces a promotional partnership between Diet Coke and "The Devil Wears Prada 2" for its eagerly awaited release. Consumers can enter a prize draw by purchasing Diet Coke, scanning their receipt, and using points to win a trip to New York, cinema tickets, or exclusive merchandise. The promotion encourages participation with the chance to win stylish items and celebrate the return of beloved characters.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on United Airlines to $118 From $125, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has lowered its price target for United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (UAL) to $118 from $125 but reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes despite the airline facing challenges such as rising fuel costs, as indicated by other recent analyst actions and news within the airline sector. United Airlines' business primarily focuses on passenger transportation, with significant operations across the United States, Canada, Atlantic, Pacific, and Latin America regions.

feed.title: APLS Stock Soars 140% Today – Here’s Everything To Know About Its Massive $5.6B Deal With Biogen
feed.summary: Shares of Apellis Pharmaceuticals Inc. (APLS) skyrocketed 140% in pre-market trading after Biogen Inc. (BIIB) announced its agreement to acquire Apellis in a $5.6 billion deal. Biogen stated that this acquisition will enhance its rare-disease treatment portfolio and accelerate its expansion into nephrology. Retail sentiment on Stocktwits was bullish, with high message volumes following the news.

feed.title: Citigroup (C) Receives a Buy from Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Mike Mayo has reiterated a Buy rating for Citigroup (C) with a price target of $150.00. This follows a similar Buy rating by Piper Sandler. Citigroup reported quarterly revenue of $40.86 billion and a net profit of $2.43 billion for the quarter ending December 31, and corporate insider sentiment for the stock is currently negative due to increased insider selling.

feed.title: Lord & Richards Wealth Management LLC Has $1.35 Million Position in Quanta Services, Inc. $PWR
feed.summary: Lord & Richards Wealth Management LLC reduced its stake in Quanta Services, Inc. by 39.6% in Q4, selling 2,094 shares but still holding 3,197 shares valued at $1.35 million. Despite this, Quanta Services reported a strong quarter with an earnings beat and 19.7% revenue growth, offering positive FY2026 EPS guidance and declaring a $0.11 quarterly dividend. The company also enjoys significant analyst support with an average target price of $589.86 and a "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: Constellation Holds 2026 Business and Earnings Outlook Conference Call
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation is hosting a webcast on March 31, 2026, to discuss its 2026 Business and Earnings Outlook. The company is well-positioned to meet the growing demand for reliable, clean energy, benefiting from its recent combination with Calpine and its extensive portfolio of nuclear, natural gas, and geothermal assets. Constellation anticipates strong, durable earnings growth, projecting more than 20% growth through 2030, with further potential for outperformance as market conditions evolve.

feed.title: Why BTIG cut its target on Humacyte (HUMA) but kept a bullish view on the bigger opportunity
feed.summary: The article discusses why BTIG lowered its price target on Humacyte (HUMA) but maintained a bullish outlook due to significant long-term potential. The report likely details the reasons for the target adjustment, such as short-term challenges or market conditions, while emphasizing the company's underlying value and future growth prospects.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Sticks to Its Buy Rating for State Street (STT)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Mike Mayo has reiterated a Buy rating on State Street (STT) with a price target of $143.00, aligning with a recent Buy rating from TipRanks – PerPlexity Asset Management. This contrasts with RBC Capital's recent Hold rating on the stock. Despite the positive analyst sentiment, corporate insider sentiment for STT is negative, with recent share sales by executives.

feed.title: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) Receives a Buy from Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Shahriar Pourreza maintained a Buy rating on Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) with a price target of $450.00. This follows a similar Buy rating from Citi, though TipRanks – xAI reiterated a Hold rating on the same day. Constellation Energy reported Q4 revenue of $5.46 billion and a net profit of $432 million.

feed.title: Eli Lilly to buy Centessa in $6.3 billion deal for sleep medicines
feed.summary: Eli Lilly announced its intention to acquire Centessa Pharmaceuticals for approximately $6.3 billion to expand its portfolio in sleep-wake disorder treatments. The deal offers Centessa shareholders $38 per share in cash, with an additional non-transferrable contingent value right of about $9, bringing the total potential value to $7.8 billion. Following the news, Centessa's U.S.-listed shares surged by 46% in premarket trading.

feed.title: BofA Securities initiates HubSpot stock coverage with buy rating
feed.summary: BofA Securities initiated coverage on HubSpot Inc (NYSE:HUBS) with a Buy rating and a $300.00 price target, seeing the current price as an attractive entry point. Analyst Matt Bullock anticipates HubSpot will reaccelerate growth to 20% this year, despite a 71% drop in shares from 2025 highs and concerns about AI disruption. The company boasts impressive gross profit margins of 84%, and 22 analysts have recently increased earnings estimates.

feed.title: Royal Fund Management LLC Sells 91,189 Shares of Starbucks Corporation $SBUX
feed.summary: Royal Fund Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Starbucks Corporation by 61.3% in Q4, selling 91,189 shares and retaining 57,666 shares valued at $4.858 million. This comes as company insiders also sold shares, totaling 4,729 shares over the last 90 days, reducing insider ownership to 0.03%. Despite these sales, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $103.07 for Starbucks.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH Position Decreased by Raub Brock Capital Management LP
feed.summary: Raub Brock Capital Management LP reduced its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation by 4.2% in the fourth quarter, now owning 27,830 shares valued at $24.46 million, making it their third largest position. This comes as company insiders have also sold a significant number of shares, totaling over $9.89 million in the last three months. Despite this, Parker-Hannifin reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target near $1,000.

feed.title: Raub Brock Capital Management LP Trims Stake in Motorola Solutions, Inc. $MSI
feed.summary: Raub Brock Capital Management LP reduced its stake in Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) by 41.9% in Q4, selling 14,611 shares and ending with 20,240 shares valued at $7.76 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in MSI. Despite insider selling, analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $497.14, following Motorola's strong Q4 earnings beat and a declared quarterly dividend of $1.21.

feed.title: Royal Fund Management LLC Makes New Investment in Xylem Inc. $XYL
feed.summary: Royal Fund Management LLC has reportedly acquired a new position in Xylem Inc. (NYSE: XYL) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 22,002 shares valued at approximately $2.996 million. Other institutional investors also increased their stakes, bringing total institutional ownership to 87.96%. Xylem recently reported Q4 EPS in line with estimates, boosted its quarterly dividend, authorized a $1.5 billion share buyback, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $158.08.

feed.title: Royal Fund Management LLC Purchases 29,425 Shares of Xcel Energy Inc. $XEL
feed.summary: Royal Fund Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Xcel Energy Inc. by 160.4% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 29,425 shares. The institutional investor now holds 47,774 shares of Xcel Energy, valued at approximately $3.53 million. This comes as Xcel Energy raised its quarterly dividend to $0.5925 per share, offering a 3.0% yield, and reported Q4 earnings per share that met analyst estimates.

feed.title: Biogen to buy Apellis Pharmaceuticals for $5.6 billion
feed.summary: Biogen has agreed to acquire Apellis Pharmaceuticals for approximately $5.6 billion in cash, aiming to expand its rare-disease drug portfolio. Apellis shareholders will receive $41 per share in cash, a significant premium, plus potential additional payments tied to the global sales of their eye disorder drug Syfovre. This announcement led to a substantial premarket rise in Apellis' share price.

feed.title: Amazon Leo to power in-flight Wi-Fi for Delta Air Lines starting in 2028
feed.summary: Amazon Leo and Delta Air Lines have announced a multi-year agreement to bring high-speed, low-latency in-flight Wi-Fi to hundreds of Delta aircraft, beginning in 2028. This partnership will enhance the travel experience for millions of Delta passengers, offering free Wi-Fi for SkyMiles members and leveraging Amazon's advanced satellite technology. The collaboration builds on Delta's existing relationship with AWS, integrating various Amazon technologies to improve the overall customer journey.

feed.title: Advisers get global stock exposure on U.S. exchanges in MSCI deal
feed.summary: Syntax Data and MSCI Inc. have partnered to offer a range of MSCI's global ADR indexes on the Syntax Direct platform, enabling financial advisers to build customized international portfolios on U.S. exchanges. This collaboration aims to democratize global market access for advisers and their clients by providing diversified international equity exposure through American Depositary Receipts (ADRs). The partnership will also help MSCI expand into the independent Registered Investment Adviser (RIA) channel, enhancing wealth management distribution.

feed.title: Royal Fund Management LLC Has $5.58 Million Position in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: Royal Fund Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Procter & Gamble (PG) by 22.1% in Q4, reaching a position worth approximately $5.575 million. Despite this, insiders have recently sold a substantial amount of shares, totaling over $55 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for PG, with a consensus target price of $167.83 for the company known for its strong dividend and consumer staples portfolio.

feed.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Adobe's and Microsoft
feed.summary: Zacks Investment Ideas highlights Adobe (ADBE) and Microsoft (MSFT) as great tech stocks to buy, noting both are trading at historically low forward earnings multiples despite recent market sell-offs driven by AI concerns. The article suggests these established tech titans, while impacted by AI advancements and spending, offer significant upside potential for long-term investors. Both companies have integrated AI into their offerings and continue to demonstrate strong revenue and earnings growth.

feed.title: Biogen to Acquire Apellis, Enhancing the Company’s Growth Portfolio in Immunology and Rare Disease, Bolstering Growth Outlook and Accelerating Expansion into Nephrology
feed.summary: Biogen announced its definitive agreement to acquire Apellis Pharmaceuticals for approximately $5.6 billion in cash, plus a contingent value right. This acquisition is set to bolster Biogen's growth portfolio in immunology and rare diseases by adding two commercialized products, EMPAVELI and SYFOVRE, which generated $689 million in combined net sales in 2025 and are expected to grow significantly. The deal will also accelerate Biogen’s expansion into nephrology and is anticipated to be increasingly accretive to its non-GAAP diluted EPS starting in 2027.
